title: GST Rates Rationalised for a Greener India!
content:
# GST Rates Rationalised for a Greener India!

Ek important update hai! Government ne India ke green transition ko accelerate karne ke liye GST rates mein rationalisation announce kiya hai. Iska aim hai eco-friendly initiatives ko promote karna.

Kuch key points:
*   **Waste Management:** Common Effluent Treatment Plants (CETPs) dwara provide kiye jaane wale services par GST 12% se ghata kar 5% kar diya gaya hai. Isse MSMEs ko waste treatment mein cost savings milengi.
*   **Biodegradable Products:** Plastic pollution se nipatne ke liye, biodegradable bags par GST 18% se kam karke 5% kar diya gaya hai. Isse yeh products aur affordable ho jayenge.
*   **Green Mobility:** Buses aur commercial goods vehicles (BS-VI compliant) par GST 28% se ghata kar 18% kar diya gaya hai. Isse clean mobility solutions ko adoption milega.
*   **Objective:** Yeh reforms 'Viksit Bharat 2047' aur LiFE (Lifestyle for Environment) movement ke saath aligned hain, jisse India apne Net Zero 2070 ke targets achieve kar sake.
